source: bounded local Convex diagnostic capture; raw message log intentionally not retained
rootCause: The client caught a licensed-image fetch or conversion failure, substituted the new remote Openverse result URL, and then submitted update_image. The server correctly permits a remote URL only when it is the element's unchanged URL for reframing, so both replacement attempts failed closed.
remediation: Fetch the bounded Openverse thumbnail, embed an accepted raster under the patch limit, and never submit a new remote URL as a fallback.
